name: com.indiegabo.handy-tools
description: A modular Unity toolkit with kernel infrastructure, configurable systems, editor workflows, and reusable runtime support for production projects.

samples.description: Character Controller Pro sample scene and authored state assets for the HandyTools FSM module. Requires Character Controller Pro.

scripts.feature-finish-checklist: echo Verify whether Assets/HandyTools/package.json description still matches the current package scope and update it if needed before releasing
scripts.pre-release: npx auto-changelog -p && npm run feature-finish-checklist && echo Go create Unity .meta and any starter unitypackages before releasing
